{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Trade tongue
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The galactic [[Trade tongue]] is a language used by [[Aethril]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12">''The Captain'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“There’s no need for that,” he said, in the galactic Trade tongue.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Language and scripts]]
